description_long: This is a modern, two-story house set on a rectangular plot with manicured lawns and palm trees lining the perimeter. The structure features a flat roof, large floor-to-ceiling windows, and multiple outdoor living spaces, including a spacious patio and a swimming pool at the rear. The front of the house is defined by a gated driveway and a prominent entryway with steps leading up to a covered porch. The side elevations reveal a mix of open terraces and shaded balconies, enhancing the indoor-outdoor connection. The rear of the house opens to a large deck area with direct access to the pool, ideal for entertaining. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a seamless integration with the surrounding landscape.
description: A modern two-story house with flat roof, large windows, gated driveway, and a backyard pool, surrounded by palm trees and manicured lawns.
description_view_0: Front view showing the gated driveway, main entry steps, and symmetrical landscaping with palm trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated structure, open terraces, and the pool area extending from the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring the expansive patio, swimming pool, and large glass doors opening to the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying additional balconies, shaded outdoor spaces, and the driveway entrance.
attribute_entryway_design: Prominent front steps leading to a covered porch with a modern door, flanked by large windows and minimalistic landscaping.
